name: marriott / Hotel workflow 324
task: Find two rooms in a cheapest  hotel in Niagra Falls for three adults and one three year old  kid from May 17 to May 20, view only available hotels within 100 to 200 dollar range  with taxes and fees, and choose the cheapest hotel that offers free breakfast and a pool.
